controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (payments banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Payments Banks -
Undertaking of Financial Services) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (payments banks - undertaking of financial services) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into force with immediate effect
controls.control_description: These Directions shall come into force with immediate effect.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into force with immediate effect

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to payments banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as 'a bank')
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be applicable to Payments Banks (hereinafter collectively
referred to as 'banks' and individually as 'a bank').
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to payments banks (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'banks' and individually as 'a bank')

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 1'agency business' means an arrangement under which a bank acts as an agent of a third-party product or
controls.control_description:
In these directions, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall
bear the meanings assigned to them below:
(1) 1'Agency Business' means an arrangement under which a bank acts as an
agent of a third-party product or service provider (TPPSP), without risk
participation, to facilitate the sale of the latter's financial products or services
(e.g., insurance, mutual fund, pension fund, etc.) to its own customers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them below: (1) 1'agency business' means an arrangement under which a bank acts as an agent of a third-party product or

controls.control_objective: To ensure enter into an agreement with a tppsp for sale of only regulated financial products or services
controls.control_description:
Under
agency business arrangement, the bank shall enter into an agreement with
a TPPSP for sale of only regulated financial products or services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to enter into an agreement with a tppsp for sale of only regulated financial products or services

controls.control_objective: To ensure inter-alia include marketing, sales, promotion, initial point of contact for redressal of grievance and other after-sale services related to the produ
controls.control_description:
The
activities covered under agency business arrangements may inter-alia
include marketing, sales, promotion, initial point of contact for redressal of
grievance and other after-sale services related to the product or service.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to inter-alia include marketing, sales, promotion, initial point of contact for redressal of grievance and other after-sale services related to the produ

controls.control_objective: To ensure a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'
controls.control_description:
(1A) 'Financial Services Company' means a company engaged in the
'business of financial services'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to a company engaged in the 'business of financial services'

controls.control_objective: To ensure include - note: under referral arrangement, the bank shall neither be involved in any of the processes relating to the third-party products or service
controls.control_description:
<image>
Explanation: The 'business of financial services' shall include -
Note: Under referral arrangement, the bank shall neither be involved in any
of the processes relating to the third-party products or services (TPPS) nor
the name or brand of the bank shall feature in any of the product/service
documents.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to include - note: under referral arrangement, the bank shall neither be involved in any of the processes relating to the third-party products or service

controls.control_objective: To ensure either be integrated with the bank's platform/carried out within the premises of the bank (unless specifically permitted) or be accessible in the form of a micro-site or micro- application
controls.control_description:
No processes relating to TPPS shall either be integrated with
the bank's platform/carried out within the premises of the bank (unless
specifically permitted) or be accessible in the form of a micro-site or micro-
application, except for an access link to redirect the customer to the TPPSP.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to either be integrated with the bank's platform/carried out within the premises of the bank (unless specifically permitted) or be accessible in the form of a micro-site or micro- application

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or any statutory mo
controls.control_description:
All other expressions unless defined herein shall have the same meaning as
have been assigned to them under the Banking Regulation Act, 1949 or the
Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934, or any statutory modification or re-enactment
thereto, or Glossary of Terms published by RBI or as used in commercial
parlance, as the case may be.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as have been assigned to them under the banking regulation act, 1949 or the reserve bank of india act, 1934, or any statutory mo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be responsible for approval of policies, and risk governance in respect of various activities undertaken by the bank
controls.control_description:
The Board of a bank shall be responsible for approval of policies, and risk
governance in respect of various activities undertaken by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be responsible for approval of policies, and risk governance in respect of various activities undertaken by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place board-approved policies for, (1) insurance distribution to, inter alia, ensure customer suitability, appropriateness, and a clear grievan
controls.control_description:
A bank shall put in place Board-approved policies for,
(1) insurance distribution to, inter alia, ensure customer suitability,
appropriateness, and a clear grievance redressal framework and
compensation policy to address service-related issues effectively and
(2) governing the corporate agency business of insurance companies
undertaken departmentally by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to put in place board-approved policies for, (1) insurance distribution to, inter alia, ensure customer suitability, appropriateness, and a clear grievan

controls.control_objective: To ensure , at a minimum, cover the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, customer suitability and appropriateness, and the framework for grievance red
controls.control_description:
The policy shall, at a minimum,
cover the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, customer
suitability and appropriateness, and the framework for grievance
redressal.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to , at a minimum, cover the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, customer suitability and appropriateness, and the framework for grievance red

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that a robust internal grievance redressal mechanism is in place
controls.control_description:
In respect of insurance distribution business, the Board shall ensure that a
robust internal grievance redressal mechanism is in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that a robust internal grievance redressal mechanism is in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so only departmentally
controls.control_description:
Unless specified otherwise in these Directions, a bank desirous of undertaking
the businesses permitted under Section 6(1) of the Banking Regulation Act,
1949 and under the specific licensing conditions, may do so only
departmentally.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so only departmentally

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following conditions: (1) there shall be a policy which shall comprehensively cover the said business including identification of va
controls.control_description:
Further, an activity undertaken departmentally shall be
subject to the following conditions:
(1) There shall be a policy which shall comprehensively cover the said
business including identification of various risks associated with it and an
appropriate risk mitigation framework, including adherence to capital
allocation norms;
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be subject to the following conditions: (1) there shall be a policy which shall comprehensively cover the said business including identification of va

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with
controls.control_description:
(2) The instructions / guidelines on KYC / AML / CFT applicable to banks,
issued by RBI from time to time, shall be complied with;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with

controls.control_objective: To ensure be adhered to
controls.control_description:
(3) The general principles as enunciated in the Charter of Customer Rights
issued by RBI shall be adhered to;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be adhered to

controls.control_objective: To ensure be complied with in addition to the instructions / regulations of respective regulators such as sebi, irdai and pfrda, as applicable
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be complied with in addition to the instructions / regulations of respective regulators such as sebi, irdai and pfrda, as applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure obtain prior approval of rbi before engaging in a financial activity other than those stated in chapter iv
controls.control_description:
and
(5) A bank shall obtain prior approval of RBI before engaging in a financial
activity other than those stated in Chapter IV.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to obtain prior approval of rbi before engaging in a financial activity other than those stated in chapter iv

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be subject to their respective licensing guidelines/conditions
controls.control_description:
(6) In addition to the above, conduct of business by Payments Banks shall
also be subject to their respective licensing guidelines/conditions.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also be subject to their respective licensing guidelines/conditions

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit an application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah
controls.control_description:
A bank desirous of undertaking any business that requires prior approval / no-
objection of RBI shall submit an application through Pravaah Portal
(https://pravaah.rbi.org.in) to the Department of Regulation (DoR), Central
Office, RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit an application through pravaah portal (https://pravaah

controls.control_objective: To ensure be undertaken only for the products and services in which a bank is permitted to deal in as per banking regulation act, 1949
controls.control_description:
Agency business shall be undertaken only for the products and services in which
a bank is permitted to deal in as per Banking Regulation Act, 1949.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be undertaken only for the products and services in which a bank is permitted to deal in as per banking regulation act, 1949

controls.control_objective: To ensure be provided on fee basis, without any risk participation
controls.control_description: The service shall be provided on fee basis, without any risk participation.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be provided on fee basis, without any risk participation

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following additional conditions: (1) a bank shall undertake distribution of mutual fund units on a non-risk sharing basis and not re
controls.control_description:
Agency business of mutual fund companies undertaken departmentally shall be
subject to the following additional conditions:
(1) A bank shall undertake distribution of mutual fund units on a non-risk
sharing basis and not requiring commitment of their own funds with the
prior approval of RBI and after complying with the requirements of the
sectoral regulator for such products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following additional conditions: (1) a bank shall undertake distribution of mutual fund units on a non-risk sharing basis and not re

controls.control_objective: To ensure be forwarded to the mutual funds / registrars / transfer agents
controls.control_description:
(2) The investors' applications for purchase / sale of mutual fund units shall
be forwarded to the mutual funds / registrars / transfer agents;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be forwarded to the mutual funds / registrars / transfer agents

controls.control_objective: To ensure be at the customers' risk without the bank guaranteeing any assured return
controls.control_description:
(3) The purchase of units shall be at the customers' risk without the bank
guaranteeing any assured return;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be at the customers' risk without the bank guaranteeing any assured return

controls.control_objective: To ensure be acquired from the secondary market or bought back from a customer for selling it to other customers
controls.control_description:
(4) Mutual fund units shall not be acquired from the secondary market or
bought back from a customer for selling it to other customers;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be acquired from the secondary market or bought back from a customer for selling it to other customers

controls.control_objective: To ensure keep the investments of the customers distinct from its own investments
controls.control_description:
(5) A bank holding custody of mutual fund units on behalf of its customers
shall keep the investments of the customers distinct from its own
investments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to keep the investments of the customers distinct from its own investments

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to the following additional conditions: (1) a bank shall undertake distribution of insurance units on a non-risk sharing basis and not requ
controls.control_description:
Corporate agency of insurance companies undertaken departmentally by banks
shall be subject to the following additional conditions:
(1) A bank shall undertake distribution of Insurance units on a non-risk
sharing basis and not requiring commitment of their own funds with the
prior approval of RBI and after complying with the requirements of the
sectoral regulator for such products.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to the following additional conditions: (1) a bank shall undertake distribution of insurance units on a non-risk sharing basis and not requ

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a board approved policy encompassing the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, issues of customer appropriateness, suitability, and grieva
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be a board approved policy encompassing the model of insurance distribution to be adopted, issues of customer appropriateness, suitability, and grieva

controls.control_objective: To ensure be maintained with a scheduled commercial bank other than itself
controls.control_description:
(3) The deposit to be maintained by an insurance broker as per the IRDAI
(Licensing of Banks as Insurance Brokers) Regulations, 2013, as
<image>
amended from time to time, shall be maintained with a scheduled
commercial bank other than itself;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be maintained with a scheduled commercial bank other than itself

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure customer appropriateness and suitability as under:
controls.control_description: (4) A bank shall ensure customer appropriateness and suitability as under:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure customer appropriateness and suitability as under:

controls.control_objective: To ensure possess the requisite qualification prescribed by irdai
controls.control_description:
(i) All employees dealing with insurance agency / broking business
shall possess the requisite qualification prescribed by IRDAI;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to possess the requisite qualification prescribed by irdai

controls.control_objective: To ensure be standardised system of assessing the need/ suitability of products for a customer and the initiation / transaction processes shall be segregated
controls.control_description:
(ii) There shall be standardised system of assessing the need/
suitability of products for a customer and the initiation / transaction
processes shall be segregated.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be standardised system of assessing the need/ suitability of products for a customer and the initiation / transaction processes shall be segregated

controls.control_objective: To ensure require the bank to necessarily undertake a customer need assessment prior to sale whereas pure risk term products with no investment or growth compon
controls.control_description:
Products with investment
components shall require the bank to necessarily undertake a
customer need assessment prior to sale whereas pure risk term
products with no investment or growth component shall be
deemed as universally suitable products;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to require the bank to necessarily undertake a customer need assessment prior to sale whereas pure risk term products with no investment or growth compon

controls.control_objective: To ensure treat its customers fairly, honestly and transparently, with regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product sold
controls.control_description:
(iii) A bank shall treat its customers fairly, honestly and transparently,
with regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance
product sold.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to treat its customers fairly, honestly and transparently, with regard to suitability and appropriateness of the insurance product sold

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that performance assessment and incentive structure for staff is not violative of section 10(1) (ii) of the br act, 1949 or the guidelines
controls.control_description:
(5) It shall be ensured that performance assessment and incentive structure
for staff is not violative of Section 10(1) (ii) of the BR Act, 1949 or the
guidelines issued by IRDAI in payment of commissions / brokerage /
incentives.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be ensured that performance assessment and incentive structure for staff is not violative of section 10(1) (ii) of the br act, 1949 or the guidelines

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be ensured that no incentive (cash or non-cash) is paid to the staff engaged in insurance broking / corporate agency services by the insurance co
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be ensured that no incentive (cash or non-cash) is paid to the staff engaged in insurance broking / corporate agency services by the insurance co

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow any restrictive practices of forcing a customer to either opt for products of a specific insurance company or link sale of such products to any
controls.control_description:
(6) A bank shall not follow any restrictive practices of forcing a customer to
either opt for products of a specific insurance company or link sale of such
products to any banking product.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to follow any restrictive practices of forcing a customer to either opt for products of a specific insurance company or link sale of such products to any

controls.control_objective: To ensure be prominently stated in all publicity material distributed by the bank that the purchase by a bank's customer of any insurance product is purely volu
controls.control_description:
It shall be prominently stated in all
publicity material distributed by the bank that the purchase by a bank's
customer of any insurance product is purely voluntary and is not linked to
availment of any other facility from the bank;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be prominently stated in all publicity material distributed by the bank that the purchase by a bank's customer of any insurance product is purely volu

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place along with a board approved customer compensation policy for resolving issues related to services offered
controls.control_description:
and
(7) A robust internal grievance redressal mechanism shall be put in place
along with a Board approved customer compensation policy for resolving
issues related to services offered.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to be put in place along with a board approved customer compensation policy for resolving issues related to services offered

controls.control_objective: To ensure be ensured that the insurance companies whose products are being sold have robust customer grievance redressal arrangements in place
controls.control_description:
It shall be ensured that the insurance
companies whose products are being sold have robust customer
grievance redressal arrangements in place.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be ensured that the insurance companies whose products are being sold have robust customer grievance redressal arrangements in place

controls.control_objective: To ensure facilitate the redressal of grievances
controls.control_description:
The bank shall facilitate the
redressal of grievances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to facilitate the redressal of grievances

controls.control_objective: To ensure do so only for financial products other than insurance, on a non-risk participation basis with prior approval from the rbi
controls.control_description:
A bank offering referral services shall do so only for financial products other than
insurance, on a non-risk participation basis with prior approval from the RBI.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to do so only for financial products other than insurance, on a non-risk participation basis with prior approval from the rbi

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The directions, instructions, and
guidelines repealed prior to the issuance of these Directions shall continue to
remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to
be governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted
under these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: (1) any right, obligation or liability acquired, accrued, or incurred thereunder

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted,
continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be
imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guidelines had not been
repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of
the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being
in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order
to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
<image>
clarifications in respect of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of
any provision of these Directions given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
